rule-no-email-without-consent.description: Marketing emails cannot be sent without active consent record

rule-unsubscribe-revokes-consent.description: Unsubscribe action immediately revokes all marketing consents
rule-unsubscribe-revokes-consent.condition: on unsubscribe → ConsentRecord.Status = 'revoked' for all marketing purposes

rule-campaign-requires-segment.description: Campaign cannot be activated without a target audience defined
